audit_summary.title: ClaimEdge AI OS — Security Audit Results
audit_summary.scope: Full AI OS — skills, databases, plugins, credentials, outputs

notion_incidents.title: Placeholder files on GitHub expose incomplete skill content
notion_incidents.description: REVISED_PROMPTS_PACKAGE_v2.md and claimedge__intake__client-intake-suite__v1/SKILL.md are placeholder text on GitHub. Could confuse Perplexity or other AI tools that read them.
notion_incidents.remediation: Push real content to replace placeholders
notion_incidents.notion_url: Created as child page of AI OS Hub

notion_incidents.title: No .github/workflows/ directory — security workflow inactive
notion_incidents.description: security-check.yml exists in docs/ but GitHub Actions only runs from .github/workflows/. The 4-job workflow is not active.

notion_incidents.title: Neon SSL mode not verified
notion_incidents.description: Connection to Neon uses SSL but sslmode not explicitly set to 'require' in all connection strings.
notion_incidents.remediation: Verify sslmode=require in all Neon connection configs

notion_incidents.title: No audit logging for skill lifecycle events
notion_incidents.description: Skill state changes (Draft→Testing→Approved→Restricted) are not logged. No trail of who approved what.
notion_incidents.remediation: Add audit_log table to Neon schema, log all state transitions

notion_incidents.title: Huuso references still exist in legacy skills
notion_incidents.description: Skills like huuso-operations-suite, huuso-brand-presentation-suite still have Huuso triggers and references.
notion_incidents.remediation: Complete rebrand audit of all Huuso skills

notion_incidents.title: No branch protection on ai-os-hub repo
notion_incidents.description: Main branch allows direct pushes without PR review.
notion_incidents.remediation: Enable branch protection requiring PR review

notion_incidents.title: Stripe products in draft mode only
notion_incidents.description: 4-tier product skeleton exists but no actual Stripe products created. This is by design pending Robert approval.
notion_incidents.remediation: Create products after Robert approves pricing

notion_incidents.title: No PII sanitization in document assembly output
notion_incidents.description: Document assembly skills could output insured PII (SSN, DOB, policy numbers) without redaction controls.
notion_incidents.remediation: Add PII detection + redaction layer to report-assembly-suite

notion_incidents.title: API keys may be hardcoded in old SKILL.md files
notion_incidents.description: Legacy skills built before security protocols may contain hardcoded tokens or API keys.
notion_incidents.remediation: Scan all 67 SKILL.md files for hardcoded credentials

notion_incidents.title: No automated backup of Notion database
notion_incidents.description: 67-skill Notion database has no automated export/backup.
notion_incidents.remediation: Set up periodic Notion→GitHub sync for the skill database

notion_incidents.title: Email address bobby.huu.so@gmail.com is legacy Huuso
notion_incidents.description: Multiple skills and configs reference the legacy Huuso email. Should migrate to ClaimEdge-branded email.
notion_incidents.remediation: Update all email references after new ClaimEdge email established

notion_incidents.title: Comet prompt still references Huuso domains
notion_incidents.description: The COMET_MASTER_PROMPT.md file references Huuso-specific domains and folder structures.
notion_incidents.remediation: Rewrite Comet prompt to ClaimEdge-only architecture

notion_incidents.title: Domain glossary not enforced in skill output
notion_incidents.description: 87-term glossary exists but no automated check that skills use canonical terms.
notion_incidents.remediation: Add terminology validation to skill QA process

notion_incidents.title: Wrestling skills trigger on claims-related keywords
notion_incidents.description: Some wrestling skills have broad triggers that could activate during claims work.
notion_incidents.remediation: Narrow wrestling skill triggers to sports-specific keywords only

github_issues_created.title: [Security] Add audit logging for skill lifecycle events
[Security] Scan all SKILL.md files for hardcoded API keys
[Security] Implement PII sanitization in Document Assembly

remediation_priority: Scan for hardcoded API keys (sec-009 / Issue #3)
